title: eryngium pohlianum
intro: Eryngium pohlianum, also known as Sea Holly or Eryngo, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its thistle-like appearance and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Eryngium pohlianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Eryngium pohlianum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, or used as a topical cream or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
